title: chimarrhis cymosa subsp. genuina
intro: Chimarrhis cymosa subsp. genuina, also known as the 'False Jobstrea', is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, including relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Chimarrhis cymosa subsp. genuina are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
